goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should 'leave after 14:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'price', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on monday
The train should leave after 14:00 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time, price, and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get attraction type
